known_issues: beta(0.001,1) log-prob: MLX uses different parameterization at extreme shape values
beta(1,0.001) log-prob: same parameterization issue as above
gamma(0.001,1) log-prob: same parameterization issue for near-zero shape
IID ESS ≈ 50 test: got 21 — statistical variance in ESS estimation
